scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @copilotkitnext/vue run build:css && sleep 1 && concurrently "pnpm --filter @copilotkitnext/vue run dev" "pnpm --filter @copilotkitnext/web-inspector run dev" "storybook dev -p 6008 --no-open"
scripts.storybook:dev: pnpm --filter @copilotkitnext/vue run build:css && sleep 1 && concurrently "pnpm --filter @copilotkitnext/vue run dev" "pnpm --filter @copilotkitnext/web-inspector run dev" "storybook dev -p 6008 --no-open"
